title: Coca Cola Totem
description: Changes the Totem texture to the Coca cola drink
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a56ccc4c769ac017ec105f887d9519f39c6fa6e9.png)


This texture pack changes the Totem-Texture to the Coca cola soda (128x)
